name: Strawberry-Rhubarb Jam
recipeInstructions:
1. Toss rhubarb and sugar together in a stainless steel pan.
2. Cover the pan and let it set overnight.
3. The next day, add water to taste, bring to a boil.
4. Turn down the heat and simmer (uncovered) for 12 minutes.
5. Remove from heat and stir in Jell-O until completely dissolved.
6. Pour into containers. Cover and store in refrigerator.
7. Makes about 1-1/4 quarts. (Freezes well)
